title: Better Potato
description: Optimized and visually enhanced for a potato
body:
Optimised and visually enhanced for a potato
This modpack aims to enhance performance and stability while providing a visually appealing upgrade.
It primarily targets 60fps at 1080p medium to high settings for low-end hardware.

# List of Mods
- [bad packets](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets)
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
- [Blur Perfected](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-perfected)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Effect Timer Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/effecttimerplus)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)

# List of Resource Packs
- [Animated Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animated-items)
- [Animated Ore](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animated-ore)
- [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass)
- [Low Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-fire-pack)
- [Low Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-shield-pack)
- [Mace but 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mace-but-3d-resourcepack)

# Disclaimer
I do not own any mods, libraries, APIs, and Resource Packs included in this modpack. All rights are reserved by their respective creators. **It is primarily here for my convenience**
